subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Him Who hath sent down that which lay concealed in the heaven of His will, and revealed that which was treasured within His knowledge [3.5s]... ...The Afnans arrived in Beirut. After some time they received permission to come in small groups. Finally, they entered the shelter of grace
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل ما کان مکنونا فی سماء مشیته و اظهر ما کان مخزونا فی علمه
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for protection, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
